ground_truth.title: How Much Pest Control Cost In New York, NY | Find Pest Control Service Near You
ground_truth.main_content: Use this free guide to calculate how much pest control services cost in New York, NY. Get prices for one-time treatment, monthly, and quarterly home pest control treatment. In New York, pest control services cost around $152 for a one-time treatment, and/or $37 for weekly services. For homeowners looking for quarterly pest control services, expect to invest around $129 per treatment. Here’s what you need to know before you hire a pest control company in your area. Types of Pest Control Services in New York Usually, pest control for invaders such as ants, spiders, and roaches is a standard service. However, dealing with rodents or termites ups the price for treatments. Here’s a list of calming pest control solutions in your area: Termites Bedbugs Spiders Ants Mosquitoes Flies Wasps/Bees Roaches And much more Pest Control Pricing in New York, NY Pest  Control Itemized Costs* Single Treatment    $143 – $298 First visit Visit    $155 – $304 Monthly Treatment    $45 – $71 Quarterly Treatment    $92 – $287 Annual Treatment    $272 – $484 *The pest control costs in the chart above are for a 1,600 – 2,000 square foot house. Pest control cost or increase in larger houses, but generally not much more than 10 to 15%. These are estimates only. For an accurate quote please request an in-house consultation. Pest Control Prices by Treatment Type Below is a pest control price list based on the type of service the New York, NY homeowner may require. Ant Control Cost    $87 – $376 Termite Exterminator Cost    $488 – $2,452 Tick Control Cost    $176 – $452 Bed Bug Treatment Prices    $289 – $668 Beehive Removal Cost    $92 – $399 Mouse Exterminator Cost    $77 – $245 Roach Extermination Cost    $89 – $377 Squirrel Removal Fees    $72 – $365 Silverfish Extermination Cost    $129 – $387 Spider Removal Cost    $121 – $213 Wasp Control Cost    $118 – $802 Mosquito Control Prices    $125 – $397 Reliable Pest Control Companies in the Near Me: Below is a list of reliable pest control companies near you. Reach out to them directly or use our free tour to request competitive pricing from local pest control companies in your area. Positive Pest Control of NYC 166 East 96th Street Suite GRC New York, NY 10128 Broadway Pest Services 782 Amsterdam Ave New York, NY 10025 Organic Pest Control NYC 342 E 87th St New York, NY 10128 Green Earth Pest Control, Inc. 116 W 23rd St 5th Floor New York, NY 10011 Weather Impacts on Pest Control The local weather in New York has a significant impact on the type of pest control solutions homeowners deal with. In New York City, you can expect to feel the bite of wintertime temperatures as they drop below freezing and snow falls on occasional evenings. Summers are much more forgiving with highs into the upper 80s degrees Fahrenheit throughout most months.
